message:
Fix console errors, stale data, drill-down, group form, CRD stats, node repair (#4459)

- #4436: Remove noisy console.error for non-critical WS parse failures
- #4438: Add freshness indicators to NodeDrillDown and MultiClusterSummaryDrillDown
- #4444: Make deployment issues clickable in ClusterDetailModal via drillToDeployment
- #4446: Show new group button even when no groups exist and form is closed
- #4447: Fix CRD stats summary to use statsSource.length instead of totalItems
- #4448: Replace disabled repair button with healthy indicator when node has no issues

Fixes #4436, #4438, #4444, #4446, #4447, #4448

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
